originalTitle: Grand Theft Auto VI: Official Cover Art Reveal
content: Pre-orders for Grand Theft Auto VI will officially begin on June 25 on digital storefronts and at other select retailers. Check out the official cover art, also available as downloadable artwork at rockstargames.com/VI
chineseTitle: | G | r | a | n | d | | T | h | e | f | t | | A | u | t | o | | V | I | ： | 官 | 方 | 封 | 面 | 艺 | 术 | 揭 | 晓 |
chineseContent: Grand Theft Auto VI 将于 6 月 25 日在数字店面和其他精选零售商处正式开始预订。查看官方封面艺术，也可以在 rockstargames.com/VI 上下载艺术作品
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 YouTube 热门视频信号，适合用于观察大众注意力、内容叙事、传播主题和跨平台选题机会。
